channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Snap & Grab launches April 24 for PC, later for consoles
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Episode 1 at launch, with 2 to 5 to follow throughout 2026.

Heist puzzle adventure game Snap & Grab will launch for PC via Steam on April 24, developer No Goblin announced. “Episode 1: The Penthouse” will be available at launch, with Episodes 2, 3, 4, and 5 to follow as downloadable content through the summer and fall.

While previously announced for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC under the publishing of Annapurna Interactive, Snap & Grab will now be self-published by No Goblin, and launch for consoles at a later date. Specific platforms are unconfirmed.

Here is an overview of the game, via No Goblin:

Snap Things and Grab ‘Em!

New York, 1987. Enter Nifty Nevada: the world’s most famous fashion photographer. Glamorous and glittering, her globe-hopping career has given her the perfect cover for her real passion—stealing everything in sight. With the help of her loyal and very professional henchmen, Nifty uses her photography skills to plan the most daring heists.

Despite her perfect alibi, Nifty has attracted the attention of one Detective Rio Rivers, the hardest working officer at Interpol. An unstoppable instrument of justice, Rio has been doggedly pursuing Nifty’s every move for months, and she knows that at any moment the evidence she needs to finally break the case will come to light! Any day now. In the meantime, it’d be nice if Nifty stopped looking at her with her beautiful eyes! There’s crime behind that stunning smile, and Rio knows it.

Gameplay

As Nifty, you’ll travel to exclusive and exotic locations to scout out the most valuable targets. Swipe anything and everything; the world is your very stealable oyster! Use your camera to take photos of treasures, threats, opportunities, and danger, then use those photos to assemble the plan for your crew.

You never know what surprises might pop up! Your henchmen are definitely top tier, and not some random crime guys, so whatever happens is probably not their fault.

Once you’ve secured the goods, bring them home to your brand new luxury apartment. Turn this place into your own personal museum with anything you please—stolen paintings, statues, pets, even robot butlers! You know, rich people stuff. Everyone is going to be so jealous of your cool things.

Your Crew

The world’s greater fashion photographer-slash-criminal mastermind spares no expense when it comes to assembling a crew. Whether it’s brains, brawn, style, or silky soft fur, Nifty will need all of their talents to pull off the perfect heist.

Five potential henchmen are shown: a cat, a buff guy, an old lady with a wrench, a socialite, and a mysterious figure in robes. There is a 6th image of a question mark.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Locales

Nifty starts off with Brick Hammer and The Conversationalist in Snap & Grab “Episode 1: The Penthouse,” but that’s just the start for her crew! Grow your team with a brilliant and uniquely skilled new crew member in every episode.

Nifty’s quest for the ultimate riches spans five action-packed episodes, and will take you all around the globe to the most fabulous parties and events fit to rob. Will you take all the fish from the Artquarium, or all the art? Both? Will the elusive Heart of Glass be too much to handle in the disappearing Ice Hotel of Giza?

Start the story on April 24th with “Episode 1: The Penthouse,” then tune in through the rest of 2026 as the next four episodes lead Nifty and her crew around the world as they attempt to complete the world’s most lavish and ridiculous heists.

Episodes Downloadable Content

  • Episode 2: Artquarium (June 2026) – Nifty Nevada’s adventures continue at sea! In search of a new henchmen and some new decor for the penthouse, our crew sets sail for the Artquarium, the world’s first aquarium and art museum in one. With Rio hot on her trail, will Nifty be able to steal the enchantingly rare 40-year clam pearl? Fun new challenges and treasures await you! This downloadable content contains a new open world level with heists, photo challenges, and a new henchmen to recruit permanently to your crew.
  • Episode 3: Fashion Train (2026) – It’s off to Japan for the train trip of a lifetime! Departing from Kyoto, the Fashion Train is a cat themed fashion excursion like nothing else. Glamorous models strut the catwalk while Nifty and her crew seek out the most valuable goods on board. How much sushi can Brick eat in a single sitting? Is it enough to be removed from the function? This downloadable content contains a new open world level with heists, photo challenges, and a new henchmen to recruit permanently to your crew.
  • Episode 4: Mayan Future Expo (2026) – Deep in the jungles of Guatemala, Nifty and her crew seek to raid the Mayan Future Expo. A world’s fair to outdo any other, the Mayan Future Expo features a range of international exhibitors demonstrating the newest and most expensive technological advances their countries have to offer. Giant robots, tiny robots, what else could a girl ask for? This downloadable content contains a new open world level with heists, photo challenges, and a new henchmen to recruit permanently to your crew.
  • Episode 5: Ice Hotel (2026) – Nifty Nevada’s adventure comes to a stunning climax atop the Great Pyramid of Giza! In a one night only event, the Ice Hotel glimmers in the desert moonlight. What exclusive treasures will Nifty find at the exotic goods auction on the rooftop? Will Brick figure out how the magic show works? Is Rio finally going to solve the case of the century? Find out here in the long awaited conclusion to Snap & Grab! This downloadable content contains a new open world level with heists, photo challenges, and a new henchmen to recruit permanently to your crew.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/snap-grab-launches-april-24-for-pc-later-for-consoles
